creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ruN libdrm.old/Makefile libdrm/Makefile
--- libdrm.old/Makefile	Thu Jun 29 09:55:57 2006
+++ libdrm/Makefile	Mon Apr  9 17:50:44 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libdrm
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.0
 CATEGORIES=	graphics x11
 MASTER_SITES=	http://dri.freedesktop.org/libdrm/
 
@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@
 COMMENT=	Userspace interface to kernel Direct Rendering Module services
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
+USE_BZIP2=	yes
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
 pre-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|{libdir}/pkgconfig|{prefix}/libdata/pkgconfig|g' \
diff -ruN libdrm.old/distinfo libdrm/distinfo
--- libdrm.old/distinfo	Thu Jun 29 09:55:57 2006
+++ libdrm/distinfo	Mon Apr  9 17:51:56 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (libdrm-2.0.2.tar.gz) = f198bf2dfa224e1fbe6aa9c0df08cbfe
-SHA256 (libdrm-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 51a697654a0ded965c6845608c9d5a6975450ea91154261e9721965f5c8ce8c6
-SIZE (libdrm-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 382887
+MD5 (libdrm-2.3.0.tar.bz2) = 01a1e1ee0268a2403db42fa630036ab2
+SHA256 (libdrm-2.3.0.tar.bz2) = f8c711427fea50845811360c92f6350ff3dacb9533741470d54ae5d0a2f6848e
+SIZE (libdrm-2.3.0.tar.bz2) = 267949
diff -ruN libdrm.old/pkg-plist libdrm/pkg-plist
--- libdrm.old/pkg-plist	Thu Jun 29 09:55:57 2006
+++ libdrm/pkg-plist	Mon Apr  9 17:51:00 2007
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
 include/drm/via_3d_reg.h
 include/drm/via_drm.h
 include/xf86drm.h
+include/xf86mm.h
 lib/libdrm.la
 lib/libdrm.so
 lib/libdrm.so.2

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
